c01__L0__0__1.generated_sql:
WITH region_category_revenue AS (
    SELECT 
        c.region,
        p.cat,
        SUM(o.revenue) as total_revenue
    FROM orders o
    JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
    GROUP BY c.region, p.cat
),
ranked_categories AS (
    SELECT 
        region,
        cat,
        total_revenue,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region ORDER BY total_revenue DESC) as rn
    FROM region_category_revenue
)
SELECT 
    region,
    cat,
    total_revenue
FROM ranked_categories
WHERE rn = 1;

    FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
                  JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
    GROUP BY c.region, p.cat
) WHERE rnk = 1 ORDER BY c.region

  ROUND(SUM(o.revenue_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS total_spend_dollars
FROM customers_desc c
JOIN orders_desc o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.is_refunded = 0
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.customer_email
ORDER BY total_spend_dollars DESC
LIMIT 5;

FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
              JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
GROUP BY c.region, p.cat
HAVING SUM(o.revenue) = (
    SELECT MAX(total_revenue)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(o2.revenue) AS total_revenue
        FROM orders o2 JOIN customers c2 ON o2.cust_id = c2.cust_id
                       JOIN products p2 ON o2.sku = p2.sku
        WHERE c2.region = c.region
        GROUP BY p2.cat
    )
)
ORDER BY c.region

WHERE c.rep IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.rep
ORDER BY c.rep;

    c.plan,
    p.cat,
    SUM(o.revenue) as total_revenue,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.plan ORDER BY SUM(o.revenue) DESC) as rank
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
GROUP BY c.plan, p.cat
ORDER BY c.plan, rank;

  p.category,
  strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month,
  SUM(o.revenue_cents) AS total_revenue_cents,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.category ORDER BY SUM(o.revenue_cents) DESC) AS rn
FROM orders_desc o
JOIN products_desc p ON o.product_sku = p.product_sku
WHERE strftime('%Y', o.order_date) = '2024'
GROUP BY p.category, strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date)
QUALIFY rn = 1
ORDER BY p.category;

ORDER BY p.category;

SELECT 
  region,
  sales_rep,
  SUM(revenue_cents) AS total_revenue_cents
FROM customers_desc
JOIN orders_desc ON customers_desc.customer_id = orders_desc.customer_id
WHERE orders_desc.is_refunded = 0
GROUP BY region, sales_rep
ORDER BY region, total_revenue_cents DESC;

c11__L_ref__0__1.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  c.region,
  c.sales_rep,
  SUM(o.revenue_cents) AS total_revenue_cents
FROM orders_desc o
JOIN customers_desc c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY c.region, c.sales_rep
HAVING SUM(o.revenue_cents) = (
  SELECT MAX(rep_revenue)
  FROM (
    SELECT 
      c2.region,
      c2.sales_rep,
      SUM(o2.revenue_cents) AS rep_revenue
    FROM orders_desc o2
    JOIN customers_desc c2 ON o2.customer_id = c2.customer_id
    GROUP BY c2.region, c2.sales_rep
  ) subquery
  WHERE subquery.region = c.region
)
ORDER BY c

    c.cust_id,
    c.name,
    SUM(o.revenue) as total_revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.cust_id = o.cust_id
GROUP BY c.region, c.cust_id, c.name
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.region ORDER BY SUM(o.revenue) DESC) = 1
ORDER BY c.region;

SELECT DISTINCT
    c.region,
    c.cust_id,
    c.name,
    SUM(o.revenue) as total_revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.cust_id = o.cust_id
GROUP BY c.region, c.cust_id, c.name
HAVING SUM(o.revenue) = (
    SELECT MAX(region_revenue)
    FROM (
        SELECT c2.region, SUM(o2.revenue) as region_revenue
        FROM customers c2
        JOIN orders o2 ON c2.cust_id = o2.cust_id
        GROUP BY c2.region, c2.cust_id
    )
    WHERE region = c.region
)
ORDER BY c.region, total_revenue DESC;

SELECT c.rep,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN p.cat = 'Software' THEN o.revenue ELSE 0 END) / SUM(o.revenue), 2) AS software_revenue_percentage
FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
              JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
WHERE c.rep IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.rep
ORDER BY software_revenue_percentage DESC

SELECT
  strftime('%Y-%m', dt) AS month,
  SUM(revenue) / 100.0 AS cumulative_revenue_dollars
FROM orders
WHERE strftime('%Y', dt) = '2024'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', dt)
ORDER BY month;
